creator: jhs@berklix.com
text:
Ref send-pr 	http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=143724
& mail thread	http://docs.FreeBSD.org/cgi/mid.cgi?201002081220.o18CKXfL035625

In   http://www.freebsd.org/art.html   
After   /and Marshall Kirk McKusick (trademark holder for the BSD Daemon image
	s/trademark holder/copyright holder (1988)/

Suggestion: add a URL to:
	http://www.freebsdfoundation.org/faqs.shtml#Trademark	&/or
	http://www.freebsdfoundation.org/documents/Guidelines.shtml

Even though that does Not list:
	- Which countries which trademarks are registered in
	- Registration numbers
	- Initial & expiry dates (probably periods differ per country)
	- URLS to registration bodies, specific per country & trademark.

Cheers,
Julian
-- 
Julian Stacey: BSD Unix Linux C Sys Eng Consultants Munich http://berklix.com
Mail plain text not quoted-printable, HTML or Base64 http://www.asciiribbon.org
